amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 15 — paragraph 2
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 15 — paragraph 2

## Text proposed by the Commission

2. The levels of accuracy and the relevant accuracy metrics of high-risk AI systems shall be declared in the accompanying instructions of use.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2. The levels of accuracy and the relevant accuracy metrics of high-risk AI systems shall be declared in the accompanying instructions of use. The language used shall be clear, free of misunderstandings or misleading statements.
commission_text: 2. The levels of accuracy and the relevant accuracy metrics of high-risk AI systems shall be declared in the accompanying instructions of use.
parliament_text: 2. The levels of accuracy and the relevant accuracy metrics of high-risk AI systems shall be declared in the accompanying instructions of use. The language used shall be clear, free of misunderstandings or misleading statements.
